name: Launchpad
description: Clean, professional visual language inspired by fly.io. Navy-violet palette with semi-transparent surfaces, violet-tinted shadows, gradient accent buttons. Universally appropriate for developer tools, dashboards, and cloud platforms.

decorators.lp-panel: Main content panel with semi-transparent white bg and violet-tinted shadow. Primary container for page content.
decorators.lp-card: Card with white bg, lavender border, and subtle violet shadow. For individual items inside panels.
decorators.lp-card-hover: Interactive card with hover shadow escalation. For clickable items.
decorators.lp-header: Full-width header bar with glass effect and subtle shadow.
decorators.lp-btn-gradient: Primary gradient button with violet-to-indigo gradient and inset shadow.
decorators.lp-btn-outline: Outline button with lavender border and subtle shadow. For org switcher and secondary actions.
decorators.lp-nav-item: Nav link with transparent bg, 8px radius, 450 weight. Violet hover tint.
decorators.lp-nav-active: Active nav link with violet-10% bg and violet-700 text.
decorators.lp-divider: Section divider with lavender border. Use between nav sections.
decorators.lp-dot: 8px status dot indicator. Combine with lp-dot-success|warning|error for color.
decorators.lp-brand-bg: Deep violet brand background. For hero sections and marketing blocks.
decorators.lp-gradient-hero: Violet-to-transparent gradient overlay. For hero section depth.
decorators.lp-kbd: Keyboard shortcut badge with lavender border.
decorators.lp-code-inline: Inline code styling. Semi-transparent background, mono font.
decorators.lp-shimmer: Subtle shimmer loading animation. For skeleton states.

panel.description: Main content panel with violet-tinted shadow.

card.description: Card with lavender border and violet shadow.

kpi.description: KPI metric in a card with violet-tinted shadow.

form.description: Form in a card with clean layout.

sidebar.description: Transparent sidebar with hr dividers between sections and violet active states.

layout.description: Full page layout with top header and left sidebar.
layout.example:
Shell({ config: 'top-nav-sidebar', navState, class: css('_h[100vh]') },
  Shell.Header({ class: css('_flex _aic _jcsb _px6 lp-header') }, ...),
  Shell.Nav({ class: css('_flex _col _py3 _px3') }, ...),
  Shell.Body({ class: css('lp-panel _flex _col _gap4 _p6 _overflow[auto] _flex1') },
    router.outlet()
  )
)

alert.description: Standard Alert — launchpad tokens handle the styling.

modal.description: Standard Modal with violet-tinted border styling.

chart.example:
div({ class: css('lp-card _overflow[hidden]') },
  div({ class: css('_flex _aic _jcsb _px4 _py3 _borderB') },
    span({ class: css('_bold') }, 'CPU Usage'),
    span({ class: css('_textxs _fgmuted') }, 'Last 24h')
  ),
  Chart({ type: 'area', data: cpuData, x: 'time', y: 'percent', height: 300 })
)

deploy-log.description: Terminal-style deploy log with monospace font and color-coded severity.
